query:
SELECT 
  id,
  chrStatus,
  dteNewListing,
  dteTermination,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT 
  id,
  chrStatus,
  dteNewListing,
  dteTermination,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
LIMIT 5;
